bullets.text: Independently developed and deployed a custom construction job management platform to replace the company’s existing JobTread workflow.
Handled full project lifecycle: client meetings, requirements gathering, frontend/backend development, deployment, and ongoing feature iteration.
Built with React, Node.js/Express, and PostgreSQL; includes role-based authentication, encrypted entry code storage, and customer access controls.
Developed budgeting/financial features: nested budget groups, drag-and-drop organization, margin calculations, KPI dashboards, and expense tracking.
Created a customer document portal with PDF generation, e-signature workflows, signed access links, and approval tracking for invoices, proposals, contracts, and change orders.
Integrated QuickBooks APIs for invoice synchronization; experimented with AI-assisted pricing workflows based on item descriptions.
Migrated operational data from the legacy system (customers, jobs, documents, expenses, budget records) into PostgreSQL.
Managed deployment on a Linux VPS: SSH, firewall, automated PostgreSQL backups, environment management, and production troubleshooting.
Contributed to an internal CCTV investigation workflow for reviewing and analyzing large volumes of surveillance footage.
Worked with Azure Video Indexing and computer vision tooling to automate scene classification, behavioral flagging, and searchable video analysis.
Streamlined footage review by improving filtering, organization, and investigator review workflows for high-volume video datasets.
Processed and organized video metadata for reporting and investigative analysis.
Built a Streamlit app for sending WhatsApp messages to individual contacts and bulk recipients via CSV upload, designed for internship shortlisting and outreach automation.
Implemented per-minute scheduling, progress tracking, and status updates to avoid rate limits.
Added customizable message templates with {name} placeholders for personalized bulk outreach.
Built CSV management tools for resetting message status, previewing messages, and viewing planned schedules.
Hardware-agnostic AI interviewer (LLM + STT + TTS) using Streamlit and OpenAI; enables low-spec deployment by delegating heavy workloads to cloud providers.
Modular service layer (llm_service.py, stt_service.py, tts_service.py) decoupled from UI for testability and provider swapping.
Pluggable provider architecture via environment variables for rapid switching of LLM/speech backends.
One-command startup scripts (run.sh, run.bat) that create a virtualenv, install dependencies, and launch Streamlit.
Privacy-focused offline variant using Ollama for on-device LLM inference and Faster Whisper for local STT, ensuring full data control.
Reused shared UI/tab pattern; swapped cloud clients with local adapters while preserving service signatures for drop-in compatibility.
Model warm-load and lazy initialization to reduce startup latency and memory usage.
Client-side web app to parse Meezan Bank CSVs, categorize expenses, and visualize spending trends with interactive charts.
Auto-categorization, CSV upload, and export instructions with no backend required.
Built a React/Vite dashboard during the Business Development role at PanaceaLogics to manage Freelancer.com clients, track project data, and calculate team compensation.
Automated client data extraction by chaining project ID to owner ID to client profile lookups via the Freelancer.com API, surfacing contact details typically hidden until a client responds to a bid.
Built bid analytics features tracking success rates, earnings, and project volume with interactive charts via Recharts.
Designed an employee shift management system showing which projects arrived during each team member's working hours, with a salary and commission calculator based on awarded project metrics.
Implemented personalized message template generation for client outreach to speed up initial contact workflows.
Deployed to GitHub Pages with a one-command batch script handling dev server startup, dependency installation, and deployment.
Visualizes project file structures with ASCII art and provides comprehensive code statistics and analysis.
GitHub repo integration, interactive tree controls, and smart filtering.
